overall.description: A spaceship flies over a teal-colored planet with cloud cover before accelerating into deep space through a nebula with floating rock formations. The footage is clearly from a space exploration video game with synthetic graphics.

events.description: spaceship main engines activate with bright blue glow

agents.ego_description: piloting a spaceship in low orbit above a teal planet, maintaining steady flight before accelerating

entered.detail: large planet with white cloud formations and cyan atmosphere visible below
boxy industrial spacecraft with four rear engine nozzles

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a spaceship flying in low orbit above a massive teal-colored planet covered in white clouds. The ship maintains a steady course over the planet's surface before its main engines ignite with a blue glow around the 11-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense nebula with floating crystalline formations

events.description: exiting planetary orbit and entering dense nebula cloud with floating rock spires
game UI text 'Undiscovered Location' appears at top center of screen

agents.ego_description: navigating through nebula clouds past floating rock formations at high speed

entered.detail: dense teal-colored gas cloud surrounding the flight path with particulate matter
tall crystalline rock formations floating in zero gravity within the nebula

segments.scene_description: Having left the planet behind, the spaceship now navigates through a dense teal nebula filled with floating crystalline rock spires. The ship appears larger in frame as the camera follows closely, and a game UI element indicating 'Undiscovered Location' appears near the end of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a low planetary orbit into the depths of a crystalline nebula. It begins by tracking a spaceship as it glides over the white cloud cover of a massive teal planet. As the ship's main engines ignite with a bright blue glow, the camera accelerates away from the planetary surface and pushes forward into open space. The scene then shifts into a dense teal nebula, where the camera follows the ship closely as it navigates between floating crystalline rock spires. Finally, the perspective tightens on the vessel as a game UI element indicating an undiscovered location appears on the screen.
